_comment: Whole-artifact STRIP decisions (CLAUDE.md §4.3 source of truth; design: FABLES_DECISIONS.md Suggestion 2). Layer boundary: whole CEs / whole maps / map events here; intra-event script-call strips live in the game's script-call reference table; command-code strips live in system.md. expect_name/expect_events are fail-loud assertions against re-export renumbering. `maps` = whole-map strips, honored by Phase-5 mint (the Phase-4 orchestrator reads only common_events + map_events).

common_events.stub_message: The Tandor Network is currently unavailable.
The Tandor Network is currently unavailable.
The Tandor Network is currently unavailable.

maps.feature: empty debug/template map (80x80, tileset 6, no MapInfos entry)
maps.reason: Not a real location; excluded from Phase-5 mint. User-approved 2026-06-12. See reference/map_name_overrides.json orphans.
